degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Both initial reviewers requested preserving valid spans when a single oversized span exceeds MaxPayloadBytes.
Updated payload splitting to skip oversized spans with a batch payload_too_large error while continuing to send valid payloads.
Added a mixed-batch regression test proving valid spans before and after an oversized span are sent deterministically.
Focused re-reviews approved the fix with no remaining blocking findings.
